sglang.title: [model-gateway] Replace PolicyRegistry RwLock with DashMap for lock-free policy lookups
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The PolicyRegistry was using Arc<RwLock<HashMap<...>>> which required acquiring a std::sync::RwLock on every get_policy() call - this happens on every single request during worker selection.
Changed model_policies and model_worker_counts to use DashMap:

get_policy() is now lock-free (sharded concur

sglang.title: [Performance] optimize NSA backend metadata computation for multi-step speculative decoding
sglang.author: Johnsonms
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR optimizes metadata initialization in the NSA backend for multi-step speculative decoding.
The key idea is to replace repeated per-backend metadata computation with a precompute-once-copy-many strategy. Shared metadata is computed once and then copied/reused across backend instances,

sglang.title: [amd] Add deterministic all-reduce kernel for AMD (ROCm)
sglang.author: sunxxuns
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR enables deterministic inference on AMD GPUs by using the 1-stage all-reduce kernel which is inherently deterministic (fixed accumulation order, no atomics).
Note: This is NOT a reduce-scatter + all-gather approach. The 1-stage kernel has each GPU read all data from all GPUs and reduc

Purpose
Reorganize the FlashInferMetadata into clear prefill and decode sections that either belong to FlashInfer or TRTLLM execution pathways. This separation is desirable because it allows us to make explicit which metadata needs to be prepared for each backend, and therefore which computations ca

vllm.title: [BugFix] Handle errors when preprocessing added requests
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
preprocess_add_request() runs in the engine core input socket processing thread. It's not expected to raise exceptions but if it does, they aren't caught or logged - the input processing thread exits and the engine hangs silently :(
This PR catches and logs request-scoped preprocessing errors, and r

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix tool_choice="none" being ignored by GPT-OSS/harmony models
vllm.author: HaloWorld
vllm.bodyExcerpt: GPT-OSS models using the harmony format were ignoring the tool_choice="none" parameter and could still trigger tool calls when tools were provided in the request. This issue arose because the _make_request_with_harmony method only checked for the existence of request.tools, without accounting for th

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix logprobs with spec decode and modified logits
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
"raw" logprobs/logits mode does not currently work properly with spec decoding.
The logits need to be cloned in this case before being modified in-place by sampling parameters, but this wasn't being done in the rejection sampler.

vllm.title: [Quantization] enable compressed-tensors marlin support for turing
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The Marlin support for turing have beed added in #29901
This PR enable it in compressed-tensors.

vllm.title: [Doc][CPU] Fix index link for CPU regular release wheels
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Current generated wheel index for regular release wheels are wrong. Use absolute URLs for v0.13.0.
Wheels are placed at https://wheels.vllm.ai/${COMMIT_ID}/. However, generated wheel index point to https://wheels.vllm.ai/${VERSION}/
Nightly index are right.
Test Plans
Test Result


 Essentia

vllm.title: Add hidden dimension validation for multimodal embedding inputs
vllm.author: wenqiglantz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The original fix for GHSA-pmqf-x6x8-p7qw added options that required opting in to image and text embeds inputs. #27204
This PR adds hidden dimension validation for multimodal embedding inputs when the feature is turned back on.
Already reviewed via a private security report by @DarkLight1337 @Isotr0
